title: Andriy Yermak, Once the Muscle Behind Zelensky, Is Now Crowdfunding Bail Money
summary_full: Volodymyr Zelensky’s onetime right-hand man is accused of embezzling millions of dollars and consulting a fortuneteller on political decisions.
summary_public: Volodymyr Zelensky’s onetime right-hand man is accused of embezzling millions of dollars and consulting a fortuneteller on political decisions.
